title: Innovating Verification: New Tools & New Actors to Reduce Nuclear Risks
summary: Part of NTI's Innovating Verification reports series, Verifying Baseline Declarations of Nuclear Warheads and Materials analyzes how baseline declarations can contribute to near- and long-term arms control and non-proliferation goals and how to verify them without compromising sensitive information.
body: Verifying Baseline Declarations of Nuclear Warheads and Materials The latest from Belfer See more Part of NTI's Innovating Verification reports series , Verifying Baseline Declarations of Nuclear Warheads and Materials analyzes how baseline declarations can contribute to near- and long-term arms control and non-proliferation goals and how to verify them without compromising sensitive information.
